hooks.command: input=$(cat); command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; file=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$file" ] && exit 0; case "$file" in *.blade.php) exit 0 ;; *.php) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; out=$(php -l "$file" 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
